query:
UPDATE business_positions SET salaryAmount = 
  CASE 
    WHEN title = 'Education Operations Coordinator' THEN 68000
    WHEN title = 'Outreach Coordinator' THEN 68000
    WHEN title = 'Content Creator / Media Assistant' THEN 35000
    WHEN title = 'Academy Instructor' THEN 75000
    WHEN title = 'Community Programs Coordinator' THEN 80000
    WHEN title = 'Lead Operations Coordinator' THEN 68000
    WHEN title = 'Operations Coordinator' THEN 68000
    WHEN title = 'HR Operations Coordinator' THEN 52000
    WHEN title = 'QA/QC Operations Coordinator' THEN 52000
    WHEN title = 'Health Operations Coordinator' THEN 55000
    WHEN title = 'Procurement Operations Coordinator' THEN 55000
    WHEN title = 'Contracts Operations Coordinator' THEN 52000
    WHEN title = 'Design Operations Coordinator' THEN 52000
    WHEN title = 'Media Operations Coordinator' THEN 52000
    WHEN title = 'Project Controls Coordinator' THEN 68000
    WHEN title = 'Legal Operations Coordinator' THEN 55000
    WHEN title = 'Real Estate Operations Coordinator - SC' THEN 52000
    WHEN title = 'Real Estate Operations Coordinator - GA' THEN 52000
    WHEN title = 'Grant Writer / Proposal Specialist' THEN 95000
    WHEN title = 'Platform Administrator' THEN 95000
    ELSE salaryAmount
  END
WHERE title LIKE '%Coordinator%' OR title LIKE '%Instructor%' OR title LIKE '%Creator%' OR title LIKE '%Writer%' OR title LIKE '%Administrator%';
